landing.badge: Ihe nrụpụta Pọtụfoliyo kacha mma maka ndị mmepe
landing.subtitle: Ihe niile ịchọrọ iji gosipụta nka, ọrụ na ahụmịhe gị.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Anyị na-enye ngwaọrụ niile ịchọrọ ka ị pụọ na igwe mmadụ wee banye ọrụ nrọ gị.
landing.feature1Desc: Jiri ngwa ngwa hazie ngalaba gị, oru ngo na nka gị site na iji onye ndezi anya anyị nwere nghọta.
landing.feature2Desc: Họrọ site na ndebiri ahaziri nke ọma ma ọ bụ mepụta ọdịdị pụrụ iche nke gị.
landing.feature3Desc: Sochie ndị ọbịa gị, hụ ọrụ ndị kacha enweta nlebara anya, yana ndị ọzọ.

about.title: Banyere Ngwa
about.subtitle: Platform Onye Nrụpụta Pọtụfoliyo
about.description: DevFolio bụ ikpo okwu na-ewu Pọtụfoliyo ọgbara ọhụrụ emebere maka ndị mmepe, ndị nrụpụta na ndị okike ọkachamara.

deleteAccount.title: Hichapụ Akaụntụ na-adịgide adịgide
deleteAccount.errorMessage: Izipu ozi nkwenye agaghị ekwe omume.
deleteAccount.confirmationMessage: Ị ji n'aka na ịchọrọ ihichapụ akaụntụ gị kpamkpam?
deleteAccount.warningMessage1: Ị ga-enweta ozi-e iji kwado nhichapụ akaụntụ.
deleteAccount.warningMessage2: Ọ bụrụ na akwadoro, data niile ( Pọtụfoliyo, oru ngo, ọnụ ọgụgụ) ga-ehichapụ kpamkpam na enweghị ike ị nwetaghachi ya.

privacy.title: amụma nzuzo
privacy.intro: Amụma nzuzo a na-akọwa ka DevFolio si anakọta, na-eji ma na-echekwa ozi nkeonwe gị mgbe ị na-eji ọrụ anyị.
privacy.section1Content: Anyị na-anakọta ozi ị nyere ozugbo mgbe ị na-eke akaụntụ, na-ewu pọtụfoliyo, na ịkpọtụrụ nkwado anyị.
privacy.section2Content: A na-eji ozi gị arụ ọrụ, dokwaa ma weta atụmatụ nke ọrụ anyị yana iji kparịtara gị ozi gbasara akaụntụ ma ọ bụ ọrụ gị.
privacy.section3Content: Anyị na-emejuputa usoro nchekwa ezi uche dị na ya iji kpuchido ozi gị site na ịnweta, mkpughe ma ọ bụ mbibi na-enweghị ikike.

confirmDeleteAccount.defaultError: Ihichapụ akaụntụ agaghị eme. O nwere ike ịbụ na akara ahụ agwụla.
confirmDeleteAccount.loadingMessage: Biko chere, anyị na-edozi arịrịọ gị.
confirmDeleteAccount.successMessage: E hichapụla data gị niile kpamkpam. A ga-atụgharị gị...

forgotPassword.otpSentToEmail: Ezipula koodu OTP na email gị.
forgotPassword.emailThirdParty: Edebanye aha email a site na onye ọzọ.
forgotPassword.otpExpired: Koodu OTP kubiela. Biko rịọ koodu ọhụrụ.
forgotPassword.otpResent: Ezipula koodu OTP ọhụrụ na email gị.
forgotPassword.otpResendFailed: Izipu koodu OTP agaghị. Biko nwaa ọzọ.
forgotPassword.passwordResetSuccess: Tọgharịa okwuntughe nke ọma. Biko jiri paswọọdụ ọhụrụ gị wee banye.
forgotPassword.title: Chefuru paswọọdụ
forgotPassword.description: Tinye adreesị email edebanyere aha na akaụntụ gị. Anyị ga-eziga koodu OTP iji tọgharịa paswọọdụ.
forgotPassword.verifyOtpDesc: Tinye koodu ọnụọgụ isii nke ezigara na email gị iji kwado njirimara gị.
forgotPassword.newPasswordDesc: Mepụta paswọọdụ ọhụrụ siri ike iji chekwaa akaụntụ gị.

verifyEmail.resendError: Izipu ozi nkwenye agaghị ekwe omume. Biko nwaa ọzọ.
verifyEmail.title: Lelee email gị
verifyEmail.description: Anyị ezipụla email nkwenye na adreesị ozi-e gị. Biko mepee email ahụ wee pịa bọtịnụ <1>“Kwenye Akaụntụ”</1> ka ịgbalite akaụntụ gị.
verifyEmail.step1: Mepee ngwa email gị (Gmail, Yahoo, wdg)
verifyEmail.step2: Chọọ ozi-e sitere na DevFolio nwere isiokwu bụ "Akụkọ Akaụntụ"
verifyEmail.step4: A ga-atụgharị gị gaa na ibe nbanye ka ịbanye
verifyEmail.footerNote: Anataghị email ahụ? Lelee folda <1>Spam</1> ma ọ bụ <2>Junk</2> dị na email gị. Njikọ nkwenye ahụ bara uru maka <3>awa 24</3>.
